scripts.build: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const os = require('os'); if (os.platform() === 'win32') { execSync('powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File build.ps1', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } else { execSync('./build.sh', { stdio: 'inherit' }); }"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:js:fix && npm run lint:css:fix
